Inject a custom Auth0HttpClient with explicit timeouts and retry settings into the AuthAPI instance.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.human_impl: Replaced `configureSwagger()` method calls and `BeanConfig` setup with `register(OpenApiResource.class)`.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Update imports from `io.swagger.jaxrs` (v2) to `io.swagger.v3.jaxrs2` (v3) to match the new OpenAPI library.
Replace multiple explicit class imports with wildcard imports for cleaner code.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.human_impl: Replaced individual imports for `AdministrativeZoneResource`, `CodeSpaceResource`, etc., with `import no.rutebanken.baba.organisation.rest.*;`.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.general_idea: Remove trailing whitespace and extra blank lines for code style compliance.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/config/.human_impl: Removed trailing space in `publicJersey.getInitParameters().put("swagger.config.id","organisations-swagger-doc" );` and deleted empty lines.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/excepti.general_idea: Replace javax.ws.rs imports with jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements for Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/filter/.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Remove the '!migration' condition from the Spring @Profile annotation to simplify activation logic during the Java/Spring upgrade.
